ety: S. अम्लिका
def: s.f. The tamarind tree (Tamarindus indica) and its fruit. (Also written imblī, amblī.)
more: n. f. S. अम्लिका from अम्ल sour. Tamarind; Tamarindus Indica . Wat.
s. m. A tamarind tree. (Tamarindus indica).
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit *𑀇𑀫𑁆𑀮𑀺𑀕𑀸 (*imligā), from Sanskrit अम्लिका (amlikā). Cognate with Bhojpuri इमली (imᵊlī), Gujarati આમલી (āmalī), Punjabi اِمْلی (īmlī) / ਇਮਲੀ (īmlī).

wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِمْروز (imrōz).

ety: inf. n. iv of مسك 'to hold, retain'

def: adv. v.s.v. im.
more: (for این This, and سال Year) adv. This year.

def: (این This, and شت Night) adv. To-night.

ety: inf. n. viii of محن 'to try, prove'
def: s.m. Trial, test, proof, experiment; examination; inquiry; temptation
more: (inf. viii. of محن) s. m. Proof, trial, examination, experiment, temptation. امتحان کرنا imtiḥān karnā, To prove, experience, try, tempt.
subs: v.n. To undergo or pass an examination
v.t. To examine, test, try, prove; to tempt; to prosecute an inquiry; to make experiment or trial (of, -kā); to check, audit
imtěḥān-meṅ pūrā dar-ānā, To pass successfully through an examination or any ordeal or test.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِمْتِحَان (imtihān), borrowed from Arabic اِمْتِحَان (imtiḥān), from اِمْتَحَنَ (imtaḥana). First attested in c. 1611 as Middle Hindi امتحان (amtḥan /⁠imtihān⁠/).

ety: inf. n. viii of مدّ 'to extend,' &c.
def: s.m. Extension, prolongation; protraction; prorogation; — adj. Extended; protracted.
more: (inf. viii. of مدّ) 1. s. m. Protraction, prolongation, extension, prorogation. 2. adj. Protracted.

def: oblique plural of اِمْتِحان (imtihān, “test; exam; trial”)

ety: inf. n. viii of ملاء 'to fill'
def: s.m. Fulness, repletion, surfeit; indigestion.
more: (inf. viii. of ملأ Heb. and Ch. He filled) s. m. Repletion; indigestion.

ety: inf. n. viii of منع 'to forbid, inhibit, &c.
def: s.m. Inhibition, prohibition, prevention, restraint ( = manʻ, q.v.)
more: (inf. viii. of منع) s. m. Prohibition, restraint.

def: ( Mech ) Impenetrability.

ety: inf. n. viii of ميز 'to separate, &c.

more: (inf. viii. of میز) s. m. 1. Dis crimination, discretion, distinction, separation. 2. Preeminence. 3. Good-breeding, ceremony. امتیاز کرنا imtiyāz karnā, To discriminate, distinguish, discern; to treat with distinction.
subs: (-meṅ), To distinguish (between), to discriminate; to discern; to treat with distinction.
wety: Borrowed from Persian امتیاز

def: adj. Of discrimination; of distinction, distinguished; — of good breeding.
more: adj. 1. Having the quality of discriminating. 2. A person of distinction.

ety: inf. n. viii of مزج 'to mix'
def: s.m. Mingling; being mixed, being blended; being diluted; — mixture, union.

ety: inf. n. iv of مضی 'to pass, go'

def: God willing; inshallah; hopefully

(a pron. plur. in the oblique case) These, them. ان دنون in dinoṅ, Now a days.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀅𑀡- (aṇa-), from Sanskrit अन्- (an-), from Proto-Indo-European *n̥- (“not, un-”).

def: s.m. The grape (syn. angūr)
subs: s.m. Fox-grape; black nightshade, Sclanum nigrum.

def: s.f., Return to the true faith, conversion to God, penitence, repentance.
more: (inf. iv. of نوب) s. f. Conversion to God, repentance.

ety: inf. n. of عاند 'to act with opposition,' &c., iii of عند 'to decline or deviate,' &c.
def: s.m. Opposition, resistance, disobedience, rebellion; perverseness, obstinacy, stubbornness.
more: (from عند To oppose, to be obstinate or contumacious; analog. to Heb. To twist, to bind) s. m. Obstinacy, perverseness, resistance, stubbornness.

def: intj. Lo! behold! there now!

ety: inf. n. iv of نعم 'to be good; to be agreeable,' &c.
def: s.m. Benefaction, donative, gratuity, largess, favour, gift, present; reward, prize; grant of rent-free land
more: (inf. iv. of نعمت) s. m. Benefaction; a present, a gift, favour, benefit. (Plur. انعامات). انعام اکرام inʼāﻌm-i-ikrām, An honourable gift. ¶ anʼāﻌm, s. plur. (of نعم) Gifts, favours.
subs: s.m. An honourable or distinguishing gift
s.m. pl. Favours and honours; rewards and dignities
s.m. A document conveying an assignment of rent-free land; deed of grant
s.m. Holder of an inʻām or grant of rent-free land
(-ko), To give a reward (to), to reward; to award a prize (to), to distribute rewards or prizes
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِنْعَام (in'ām, “reward, bonus, gratuity”), borrowed from Arabic إِنْعَام (ʔinʕām), from أَنْعَمَ (ʔanʕama).

def: s.f. Benefaction, &c. = inʻām. (Rare.)

vocative plural of اِنْعَام (in'ām, “reward; prize”)

ety: v.n. fr. عنّ 'to turn aside,' &c.
def: s.f. A rein; bridle
more: s. f. Reins of a bridle, a bridle.
subs: adv. 'With loose rein'; at full gallop (syn. bag-ṭūṭ, q.v.).

ety: for A. عناية, fr. عني 'to be occupied by or with,' &c.
def: s.f. Favour, bounty; gift, present; countenance, aid, support
more: n. f. 1. Favour (احسان); bounty. 2. Countenance; aid; support. ināyat rakhnā , v. a. To show favor to; look kindly on. ināyat k. , v. a. 1. See ehsān k . 2. To grant; give. inā'yatī , adj. Bestowed; favored.
s. f. Favour, gift, present, bounty. عنايت کرنا iﻌnāyat karnā, To give, to grant.
subs: (-par), To show favour (to), to look with kindness (on)
To show favour (to, -par), &c. ( = iḥsān karnā, q.v.); to present, give, grant (to, -ko), to vouchsafe.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian عِنایَت (ināyat), borrowed from Arabic عِنَايَة (ʕināya), from عَنَى (ʕanā). First attested in c. 1421 as Middle Hindi عنایت ('nayt /⁠'ināyat⁠/).

def: s.f. pl. (of ʻināyat, q.v.), Favours; gifts, presents.
more: s. f. plur. of عنايت q. v.

def: direct plural of عِنایَت ('ināyat)

ety: rel. n. fr. ʻināyat
def: adj. Bestowed; favoured.
oblique plural of عِنایَت ('ināyat)

ety: from the English
def: s.m. Inch (measure).

ety: see aiṅćnā
def: s.f. Pulling, drawing, attraction; stretching; tightening; tendency; desire; reserve, holding back or aloof; delay, tardiness; scarcity, deficiency, want; — the banking system by which zamīndārs pay the revenue demand
more: n. f. 1. Scarcity; deficiency; drought. Abke pānī kī baṛī eṅch huī . 2. Delay; tardiness; slowness. Tum āne meṅ baṛī eṅch karte ho . 3. The banking system by which zamīṅdars pay the revenue demand. A banyā is called in who pays in the amount and afterwards recovers from each āsāmī the amount payable by him ( īṅch-manautī ).
subs: s.f. Tugging and pulling, scuffling; quarrelling.

ety: see aiṅćnā
def: s.m. Pulling, drawing, attraction.
s.m. = inć, q.v. s.m. Inch (measure).

ety: neut. of aiṅćnā, q.v.
def: v.n. To be pulled, drawn, dragged, or attracted; to be drawn tight, be tightened; to be extracted, drawn out; to be sucked up or in, be absorbed; to hold aloof, keep (oneself) apart; to be drawn, sketched, traced, copied; — to be transferred (as a debt): — iṅć-jānā = iṅćnā.
more: v. n. 1. To be pulled, drawn, dragged, attracted; to gravitate. 2. To be tightened, made or drawn tight or fast. 3. To be sucked in, absorbed, taken in. 4. To be extracted (as matter from a boil). Sārā mavād inch gāyā . 5. To keep aloof; to be stiff or exclusive. Kuchh woh iṅche iṅche rahe, kuchh ham khiṅche khiṅche, Is kash-makash meṅ ṭūṭ gāyā rishtā chāh kā . Arshad. 6. To be traced, sketched, drawn, copied. 7. To be transferred (a debt).

def: prep. At, near, nigh, about; by, close by; with, present with; in the presence of; at the place of; at the time of; among, amongst; at, on, upon; according to (it occurs only in composition)
more: adv. At; near; nigh; before; with; by; about; in; on; according to, etc. ind-ul-istifsār, yā tahqīqāt . During interrogation, inquiry, or investigation. ind-ul-paṛtāī , A. H. On examination or inquiry. ind-ul-tajvīz . Under consideration; pending trial or investigation; before the court. ind-ul-talab , adv. On demand. ind-ul-subūt . On proof; on conviction. ind-ul-zurūrat . When required or demanded. ind-ul-mulāqāt , During the interview. ind-ul-vusūl , On receipt. ind-ul-vuqū . When it happens; in such an event.

(prop. عنديٰ) adv. Near, before, with, about, in, according to, &c. عند البعض iﻌnda-l-baﻌẓ, According to some. عند التحقيق iﻌnda-t-taḥḳiḳ, In truth, certainly. عند الله iﻌnda-l-lāh, With or before God. عند الوصول iﻌnda-l-wuṣūl, On the arrival, when it happens, in such an event. عندالوقت iﻌnda-l-waḳt, In time, at the proper time, in the critical juncture.
subs: On or during interrogation, upon inquiry, or investigation
Under consideration, pending trial or investigation, before the court
At the time of applying a remedy; on the disposing of a case (in a court of justice)
In time of need, when required or demanded, on occasion of necessity
With, or before, God; for God
On the arrival (of); on receipt; when it happens; in such an event
In time, at the proper time; on occasion, in the critical juncture
On the occurrence of the event, when it happens, in such an event.

s. m. A large well of masonry.

s. f. 1. The wife of Indra. 2. The name of a medicine or plant. (Vitex negundo).

def: s.f. Wild gourd, colocynth, Cucumis colocynthis; a fruit of beautiful appearance but bitter taste; a beautiful but worthless person: — indrāyan-kā phal = indrāyan.
more: n. f. S. इन्द्रवारुणी 1. Fruit of the coloquintida plant; colocynth; a wild gourd; a fruit of beautiful appearance, but bitter taste. 2. A beautiful but worthless person. indrāyan kā phal . The fruit of Indrāyan; Cucumis colocynthis . Wat. used medicinally.
s. f. Colocynth, wild gourd (Cucumis colocynthis, a fruit of beautiful appearance but bitter taste); hence, a beautiful but worthless person is called اندراین کا پهل The fruit of indrāyan.

def: n. f. 1. A diuretic medicine. 2. Copulation; carnal intercourse. indri ke bas honā , v. n. To be lustful; to feel an uncontrollable desire for carnal intercourse; to be given up to sensual pleasures.
s.f. An organ of sense; the senses (internal or external), the organs of action and perception; the privities, membrum virile; veretrum animalium
more: n. f. S. इन्द्रिय an organ of sense. 1. The five senses, organs of perception. 2. The privities; genital organs.

s. f. An organ of sense, the organs of action and perception (the Hindūs reckoning those of action to be the hand, the foot, the voice, the organ of generation, and the organ of excretion, and those of perception to be the mind, the eye, the ear, the nose, the tongue, and the skin); the privities, membrum virile, veretrum animalium. اندري جلاب indrī-jullāb, A diuretick medicine.
subs: s.m. A diuretic medicine; — carnal intercourse, copulation
To be under the influence of lust, to be lustful; to be given up to sensual pleasure
s.m. The faculty of perception, sense, consciousness.

def: Mag. n. f. S. इष्टका, Pālī, iṭṭhikā , P. خثت A brick. Morī kī īṅṭ chaubāre chaṛhī . Prov. The drain brick is raised to the terrace. (Said of a parvenu). īṅṭ banā'nā, īṅṭeṅ pāth'nā , v. n. To make bricks. īṅṭ se īṅṭ bajā'nā , v. a. lit . To strike one brick against another. To destroy any building; to sap the foundations of; demolish; raze to the ground. Taimūr jis shahar meṅ gayā, īṅṭ se īṅṭ bajā dī. īṅṭ se īṅṭ baj'nā , v. n. To be demolished; to fall to pieces. Īṅṭ se īṅṭ baj gaī . (The city) was razed to the ground. īṅṭ-kārī, īṅṭ kī chināī , n. f. Brick-laying; brickwork. īṅṭ kā ghar maṭṭī kar'nā , v. a. 1. To pull down a brick house. 2. To destroy the fortunes of a house; to reduce to poverty. īṅṭ kā ghar maṭṭī honā , v. n. To be ruined, reduced to poverty. Īṅṭ kā ghar maṭṭī ho gayā . Prov. Saying. īṅṭ mār chaḍḍhākṛā , n. m. Children's game, in which one boy throws a stone to be hit by the others. The one who hits it has a ride on the first thrower's back up to the stone. der īṅṭ kī masjid chunnā , v. n. lit . To make a masjid of one brick and a half. To have one's own church; to have one's own way; to insist on. madarse kī īṅṭ . Fac. An old backward student who sticks in a lower class. Delhi. īṅṭā kho'yā ; E. īṅṭ kor , n. m. Brick dust.

ety: for A. ارادة, inf. n. iv of راد for رود 'to seek, seek after'

Sarkār kā yeh irādah hai. irādatan' , Ped. for irāde se , adv. 1. With a view to; with an eye to; for the purpose of; with the view of; with the intent. 2. In order to; to the end that; on account of; in pursuance of; pursuant to. 3. Intentionally; designedly; purposely; on purpose; voluntarily; willingly. 4. Deliberately; studiously; knowingly ( jān būjh ke ). irādah kār'nā , v. n. 1. To desire; intend; purpose; propose to oneself; design. 2. To be at; aim at; drive at; to be after; point at; endeavour; try; aspire to or after. 3. To me…
